name: eloscope
description: Lightweight FACEIT enhancement client for Windows

scripts.build: pnpm run build:core && pnpm run build:extension && pnpm run build:tauri
scripts.dev: pnpm run build:extension && tauri dev --config src-tauri/tauri.conf.json
scripts.test: pnpm run test:web && pnpm run build:extension && cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml
scripts.check:rust: cargo fmt --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --all -- --check && cargo clippy --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml
scripts.check: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test:web && pnpm run build:extension && pnpm run security:audit && pnpm run verify:release && pnpm run check:rust
